title: Scaling Distributed Systems with Rust
description: An in-depth look at how Sarah's team migrated core services to Rust to achieve 10x performance gains while maintaining memory safety in a high-concurrency environment.

title: AI-Driven UX: Beyond Chatbots
description: Exploring generative design patterns and predictive interfaces that adapt to user behavior without relying on traditional conversational UI.

title: The Future of WebAssembly in the Browser
description: A deep dive into upcoming Wasm proposals like GC and Threads, and how they will redefine what's possible for web applications in the next decade.

title: Zero-Trust Security for Modern Startups
description: Why traditional perimeter security is dead. Anya shares a practical roadmap for implementing identity-aware proxying and micro-segmentation from day one.

title: Green Computing: Sustainable Software Engineering
description: Measuring the carbon footprint of your code. This talk provides actionable strategies for reducing energy consumption in data centers through efficient algorithms.

title: Mastering the Edge: Edge Computing at Scale
description: Deploying logic closer to users. Lin and Kevin discuss the challenges of state synchronization and global consistency in highly distributed edge networks.
